name: Rokid AI Assistant
summary: Open-source AI assistant with phone and glasses apps for voice, photo, and AI interaction
description: Rokid AI Assistant is a voice-controlled assistant for Rokid AR glasses requiring a companion phone app. It supports AI chat, photo capture, and multi-provider AI and speech-to-text services.
author: zero2005x

listing.descriptionMarkdown:
## About
Rokid AI Assistant is an AI-powered voice and vision assistant designed for Rokid AR glasses. It uses a companion phone app to handle AI queries and connectivity, providing a wearable interface on the glasses.

## Key Features
- Voice-to-text transcription and AI chat via glasses
- Photo capture with AI image analysis from glasses camera
- Communication between phone and glasses using Rokid CXR SDK
- Support for multiple AI providers (e.g., Gemini, OpenAI, Anthropic)
- Support for multiple speech-to-text providers
- Conversation history persistence with Room database
- Multi-language support (13 languages)

## Requirements
- Rokid AR glasses paired with a phone
- GEMINI_API_KEY (or other AI provider keys) for AI processing
- Phone app required for AI processing; glasses app provides interface

## Notes
- Standalone glasses operation without phone is not supported
- Offline AI inference is not available
- No video streaming or real-time AR overlays included

releases.notes:
### New Features

- **TTS Settings Screen** — New dedicated Text-to-Speech settings UI (`TtsSettingsScreen`) with support for configuring TTS provider, voice, speed, and pitch. Includes full navigation integration and settings persistence.
- **Edge TTS Client** — Added `EdgeTtsClient` for Microsoft Edge TTS integration, providing high-quality cloud-based text-to-speech synthesis.
- **TTS Provider Model** — New `TtsProvider` data model for managing multiple TTS engine configurations.
- **AI Model Registry** — Introduced type-safe `AIModel` sealed class hierarchy with provider-specific subclasses (Gemini, Claude, OpenAI, Grok), including model metadata such as context window size, preview/deprecated status, and provider categorization via `ModelRepository`.

### Improvements

- **Bluetooth Auto-Reconnect (Glasses)** — `BluetoothSppClient` now automatically reconnects to the last connected device after an unexpected disconnection, with a 2-second delay to allow the phone server to restart its listening socket.
- **Bluetooth Reconnection Timing** — Increased connection retry backoff from `1.5s + attempt × 1s` to `2.5s + attempt × 1.5s` for more reliable reconnection across varying Bluetooth conditions.
- **Bluetooth Server Socket Recovery (Phone)** — Increased server socket re-creation delay from 300ms to 1000ms in `BluetoothSppManager`, ensuring the Bluetooth stack fully releases resources before accepting new connections.
- **Localization** — Added TTS-related strings across all 13 supported languages (Arabic, Spanish, French, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Russian, Thai, Ukrainian, Vietnamese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, English).
- **Locale Config** — Added missing `vi` (Vietnamese) and `th` (Thai) entries to `locales_config.xml`.

### Documentation

- **ARCHITECTURE.md** — Fixed 10 discrepancies to match current codebase (MessageType enum, ConnectionState/DeviceInfo, AiServiceProvider interface, service/ai file listing, ai/provider directory, AiServiceFactory signature, provider example code, etc.).
- **API_SETTINGS.md** — Updated provider tables, model names, and base URLs to reflect current code.
- **Project Documentation Site** — Added index.html for GitHub Pages hosting.

### Testing

- **4 new test files** with 100+ test cases covering previously untested code:
  - `BluetoothSppClientTest` (glasses-app) — 23 tests covering client state, connect guards, heartbeat, sendMessage, auto-reconnect, and retry backoff.
  - `BluetoothSppManagerTest` (phone-app) — 23 tests covering server state, permission checks, sendMessage, handleDisconnection, binary buffer reset, disconnect, getPacketLength, and getPairedDevices.
  - `ProviderSettingTest` (phone-app) — 30 tests covering `isValid()` for all 12 AI providers (including Baidu dual-key and Custom baseUrl-only validation), `fromId()`, and `getDefaultProviders()`.
  - `ProviderTest` (phone-app) — 33 tests covering `ChatMessage` custom equals/hashCode with ByteArray content equality, `MessageRole`, `GenerationOptions`, `GenerationResult`, `FinishReason`, `Model`, `MessageChunk`, `TranscriptionResult`, and `ValidationResult`.
- **Updated existing tests** — `AIModelTest`, `TtsProviderTest`, `ApiSettingsTest`, `TtsSettingsHelpersTest`, `AnthropicServiceTest`, `OpenAiCompatibleServiceTest` updated for new features and model IDs.
- **Total test count: 550+** across all modules.

### Build

- Version bumped to `0.12.0` (versionCode 4).
- Signed release APKs: **phone-app** (9.62 MB), **glasses-app** (4.37 MB).

---

**Full Changelog:** v0.11.0...v0.12.0

releases.notes:
## Release v0.11.0 (versionCode 3)

### Changes
- Version bump to 0.11.0
- Fixed Gradle dependency verification for guava-parent, aapt2-linux, lint, groovy, intellij-core, and other CI artifacts

### APKs
- **glasses-app-release.apk** - Rokid glasses companion app
- **phone-app-release.apk** - Phone companion app

## What's Changed

### Bug Fixes
- Fix Bluetooth initialization race conditions and crashes
- Fix missing permission check for device name retrieval
- Fix Gradle CI build (remove hardcoded Windows Java home path)

### Improvements
- Complete ProGuard/R8 rules for Room, Kotlin Serialization, Retrofit, Coroutines, DataStore, Coil
- Update dependencies (KSP, OkHttp, Compose BOM, etc.)
- Refactor RecordingsScreen to use string resources
- Single-source SN authentication strategy
- Enhanced security: sensitive properties loaded from local.properties

### APK Downloads
| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `phone-app-release-signed.apk` | Phone App (AI, Bluetooth control) |
| `glasses-app-release-signed.apk` | Glasses App (Display, Voice input) |

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/zero2005x/RokidAIAssistant/compare/v0.9.0...v0.10.0

Rokid AI Assistant v0.9.0 (Pre-release)
Downloads:

phone-app-release.apk — Install on your Android phone
glasses-app-release.apk — Install on Rokid AR glasses
Requirements:

Android 8.0+ (phone), Android 12+ (glasses)
Rokid AR glasses (CXR-S compatible)
API key for at least one AI provider
Setup:

Install the phone app on your phone
Install the glasses app on your Rokid glasses (via ADB)
Pair via Bluetooth and configure API keys in Settings
